chapter_title.ar: بَابُ دَعَوَاتٍ مُوجَزَاتٍ لِجَمِيعِ الْحَوَائِجِ لِلدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 60 – Brief supplications for the entirety of the needs of the world and the Hereafter

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/471)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن أو موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/471)
text: قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) عَلِّمْنِي دُعَاءً وَ أَوْجِزْ فَقَالَ قُلْ يَا مَنْ دَلَّنِي عَلَى نَفْسِهِ وَ ذَلَّلَ قَلْبِي بِتَصْدِيقِهِ أَسْأَلُكَ الْأَمْنَ وَ الْإِيمَانَ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Muhammad Bin Al Waleed, from Yunus who said,

‘I said to Al-Rezaasws, ‘Teach me a supplication and be brief’. So heasws said: ‘Say, ‘O Oneazwj Who Pointed me to Himselfsaww and Humbled my heart with ratifying Himazwj! I ask Youazwj for the safety and the Eman’’.
en.sarwar: 34. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Muhammad ibn al-Walid from Yunus who has said the following: “Once I asked al-Rida (a.s.) to instruct me with a concise supplication. The Imam instructed me to say, ‘O the One who has guided me to His Own self and has humbled my heart with its affirmation of His existence, I plead before You for peace and belief.”’
